examples: Indole 3 carbinol -- A nutritional compound found in cruciferous vegetables that helps hormone regulation.
With self-made Mo-Ni catalyzer, itaconic acid and carbinol are synthetised into itaconic acid dimethyl grease.
The spreading phenomena in the different expanded matter are discussed, and the proportion of Benzene and Carbinol is 1:7.
